title: Functional acceptance checklist (P-C — signed CRITERIA)
description: The user-visible observable outcomes a browser-E2E milestone must satisfy — a functional projection of the Customer-signed closure_contract (§1.7-B shape). AUTHORED BY RESEARCH, frozen at Gate-1 sign-off; Acceptance judges ONLY against these. Deliver/Dev MAY NOT edit post-sign-off (a needed change → research_contract_revision, Gate-1 re-fires). DISTINCT from the executor-contract MECHANICS (the how). criterion_id values must be UNIQUE (the driver enforces uniqueness + verdict set-equality coverage).

signed_by_human.description: Gate-1 sign-off marker; the orchestrator treats an unsigned checklist as not-frozen.

closure_contract_ref.description: The signed closure_contract / research brief this projects.

criterion_id.description: Stable, UNIQUE id; the verdict's browser cases must cover this set exactly (driver set-equality check).

criterion.description: The user-visible observable outcome (NOT a selector or mechanic).

critical.description: true ⇒ a captured executor failure on this criterion vetoes a milestone pass (→ needs_human, §3.2).
